subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Though a hundred thousand leagues of distance intervene, and mountains and plains stand as barriers and obstacles [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی هر چند صد هزار فرسنگ مسافت باشد و کوه و دشت حائل و مانع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @nearness and remoteness
